message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "actorName" as Actor1
rectangle "Manage-Data-Exchanges" {
    participant "CLI" as CLI
    participant "Web" as Web
    participant "adc" as ADC
}

Actor1 -> CLI : adc-global-create()
activate CLI
CLI -> ADC : global/create()
activate ADC
deactivate CLI
deactivate ADC

participant "actorName" as Actor2
Actor2 -> Web : global/create()
activate Web
Web -> ADC : global/create()
activate ADC
deactivate Web
deactivate ADC

@enduml
```
